phase: North Star — GAP-001 (Pillar 2: Hold with Monitoring)
summary: Closed GAP-001: HOLD positions now have a cycle-level thesis-integrity check. When the macro polarity flips (BULL→BEAR or BEAR→BULL) since entry, the position is queued for full Opus PM review. Previously, HOLD positions were only reviewed on events (score collapse, news, earnings, etc.).

strategic_gate_check.ic_values: CLEARED — non-null values present: mtf=0.032, flow=0.025, breakout=0.024, trend=-0.022 (n=60)
strategic_gate_check.win_rate_trend: WARNING — W13: 29% WR (+$124k), W14: 43% WR (+$19k), W15: 21% WR (-$29k). Overall 30.3% on 145 closed trades. W15 is deteriorating. Flagged to Amit before proceeding.

changes.portfolio_manager.py: Added _regime_polarity() helper that extracts BULL/BEAR/'' from a regime label string. Added HOLD branch in lightweight_cycle_check(): if entry polarity != current polarity (and both are non-empty), appends REVIEW action. Logic: BULL→BEAR or BEAR→BULL is a macro backdrop flip; BULL_TRENDING→BULL, BULL→NEUTRAL, or UNKNOWN entries/exits do not trigger.
changes.tests/test_cycle_check.py: New file — 13 tests covering: _regime_polarity() all cases, HOLD polar flip BULL→BEAR (REVIEW), HOLD polar flip BEAR→BULL (REVIEW), same polarity (no action), UNKNOWN/empty entry or current regime (no action), NEUTRAL shift (no action), regression tests for SCALP and SWING unchanged behaviour.

north_star_update.completion_status.hold_with_monitoring.w: updated to include HOLD polar-flip review

test_results: 13/13 new tests passed. Full suite: 1781 passed, 112 failed (all pre-existing).
